text: Good morning Jarvis! Any major events scheduled for today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Tuesday, June 03. You have the CareConnect stakeholder review at 3 PM, and Ethan has piano with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. That sounds like a sweet moment. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Took Lily to her medical checkup. I ran 5 miles but my knee felt tight. Feeling good about my routine.
title: Health Update

text: Logged that. Sleep quality is so important. Great run! Remember to stretch your hamstrings to help the knee. Keep stretching that knee!
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick update: Anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. We have a conflict about whether to prioritize security or speed for the launch. We need to back this up with solid performance metrics.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. I checked the recent logs for that. Security must come first for patient data. We can cite HIPAA standards to Greg to resolve the dispute. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. He is stuck on a math word problem involving division. I'm proud of his curiosity.
title: Kids School Update

text: Got it, Mike. School projects are fun. Try using visual diagrams to explain remainders. He'll get it quickly. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Modified the smart-home alert integrations. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. Space science and tech is a great focus. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Planning for future education costs. Sarah and I are looking to maximize our savings rate. Will talk this over with Sarah.
title: Finance Update

text: Sure thing! Budget tracking is updated. Smart move. I've summarized recent expenses so you can find cuts. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update: Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. We got beta feedback from clinics suggesting they need patient onboarding immediately. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. I've noted that. We should prioritize these clinic requests. Let's create a dedicated sub-task in the CareConnect backlog. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Bedtime can be a challenge. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that went for a run around the neighborhood. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Sure thing! That's good medical feedback. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. Keep stretching that knee!
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick log: Just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! I checked the recent logs for that. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. He is stuck on a math word problem involving division. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: Logged that. I can help with that. Try using visual diagrams to explain remainders. He'll get it quickly. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. Space science and tech is a great focus. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Looking over our mortgage options. We just signed the mortgage papers and closed on our Frisco house. Every bit of savings helps.
title: Finance Update

text: Sure thing! I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. Congratulations! Owning your home in Frisco is a major milestone for the family. Ready to calculate more rates.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update: Analyzing the system logs from yesterday's release. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /appointment/notify under load. We need to back this up with solid performance metrics.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. That is a common bottleneck. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /appointment/notify. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. CareConnect meetings took up most of the day. Logged my running mileage and stretched my knee. Got document checklists ready for the mortgage refinance. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
